team_name: InteropSync Karnataka — Self-Healing Semantic Middleware for Government Interoperability
summary: Design a bidirectional translation and propagation layer between Karnataka's Single Window System (SWS) and department systems using UBID as the common join key.
key_steps: Conflict Detection & Resolution with Policy Engine
Retry & Failure Recovery with Dead-Letter Queue
Offline-First Sync for Rural District Offices
optimization_claims: No data loss due to system failures
